strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq with MCP code generators and real-world AI product exposure
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through founding and sustaining GISCollective, an open-source AI-adjacent platform used by NGOs
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) and email, raising red flags about authenticity or professionalism
No explicit mention of Master’s/PhD in AI or formal AI research, missing preferred qualification
Limited evidence of direct cloud platform strategy leadership or customer advisory experience at director level
response.justification: Aisha has deep, relevant engineering experience spanning AI-agent systems, cloud infrastructure, and open-source platform building, aligning strongly with the role’s technical demands. However, inconsistent personal branding and lack of formal AI credentials or documented strategic customer advisory work create uncertainty. The entrepreneurial initiative and hands-on AI contributions are compelling, but the resume’s professionalism issues raise valid concerns.
